plugins.name: taskloop
plugins.description: Unattended branch -> implement -> push -> PR -> automated review -> rework -> merge -> next-task loop, plus /taskloop-plan to generate tasks for an empty backlog. VCS: GitHub/Azure DevOps/GitLab (CLI or API). Task source: docs/planning/, Jira, Asana, Monday.com, or Linear. Blocked tasks are remembered locally and auto-skipped.
